final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: needs a 618 大促电商海报 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a bold, hierarchy-driven layout — exact framing and arrangement are yours
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 as the featured brand and product hero
Scene/backdrop: needs a festive 618 campaign atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy, celebratory atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, 大促 festive direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" (brand name), "618" (large, primary hero text), "周年庆" (secondary text)
Constraints: 
Avoid:
